description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, dark slate hip roof with a prominent central chimney and a symmetrical stone facade. The front elevation displays three stories with large, multi-pane windows arranged in neat vertical rows, and a decorative pediment above the central upper windows. The stone exterior is textured and weathered, giving the building a historic and robust appearance. The side and rear elevations are more austere, with minimal window openings and plain stonework. The main entryway is located at the base of the front facade, featuring a wooden door set within a simple stone frame. Overall, the structure exudes a sense of solidity and traditional European architectural influence.
description: A tall, stone house with a steep hip roof, symmetrical multi-pane windows, and a central chimney, featuring a decorative front facade and a simple wooden entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, three stories of symmetrical windows, and a decorative pediment above the upper windows.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the large, plain stone wall, central chimney, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with three stories of windows, similar to the front but without the entry door or decorative pediment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain stone wall and no significant window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door set in a stone frame, no porch, with a decorative pediment above the upper windows.
